title: [Stronghold, Storage Room]
description: Broken containers litter the floor of the storage room, the debris consisting of wooden planks as well as pieces of stone.  Large piles have been heaped against the walls, forming a rugged landscape that slopes down to a valley where the path winds between them.  Little light intrudes here, adding to the illusion of a mountainous terrain.

wayto.3595: ;e unless (move 'go door'); echo 'Waiting for the door to open... '; waitfor 'You hear a soft click from the door and it suddenly flies open.'; move 'go door'; end
